subject: Create liquibase script for the existing database
commit_message:
Create liquibase script for the existing database

Note: The use of Liquibase is still awaiting approval from the legal
department.

Issue-ID: POLICY-3251
Change-Id: I4c9c711980fdcb9b55f7db936e21905bc840656a
Signed-off-by: ktimoney <kevin.timoney@est.tech>
